passive.name: Guerrilla Warfare
passive.description: If Teemo stands still and takes no actions for a short duration, he becomes Invisible indefinitely. If he's in brush, Teemo can enter and maintain his Invisibility while moving. After leaving Invisibility, Teemo gains the Element of Surprise, increasing his Attack Speed for a few seconds.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Teemo}} becomes {{tip|invisible}} after a brief moment remaining idle without taking damage, and will maintain so long as he remains idle or not {{tip|airborne|displaced}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: While '''Teemo''' is in {{tip|brush}}, he will gain and maintain stealth even while moving.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Innate - Element of Surprise:}} When '''Teemo''' breaks the stealth, he gains {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Teemo''' gains {{tip|invisibility}} after {{fd|1.5}} seconds without moving, taking damage, performing actions that {{tip|break stealth}}, {{tip|channel|channeling}}, or being in {{tip|stasis (buff)|stasis}}. '''Teemo''' will maintain stealth so long as he remains idle and is not {{tip|airborne|displaced}}. While in {{tip|brush}}, '''Teemo''' gains the stealth even while moving and can move without breaking stealth.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Element of Surprise:}} When '''Teemo''' breaks the stealth, he gains {{sti|{{as|{{pp|key=%|20 to 80 for 4|1;5;10;15}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* If '''Teemo''' triggers ''Element of Surprise'' twice in less than 5 seconds he will only refresh the {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed's}} duration (it will not [[stack]] with itself).
* {{tip|Charm}}, {{tip|Flee}}, and {{tip|Taunt}} will ''force'' him out of {{tip|stealth}}.
** If '''Teemo''' is in a {{tip|brush}} while stealthed, only {{tip|Taunt}} will break it.
* ''Guerilla Warfare's'' stealth is special-cased to be interrupted whenever '''Teemo''' moves from his location by any means (whether by {{tip|dash|dashing}}, {{tip|blink|blinking}}, being {{tip|airborne|displaced}}, or simply moving), thus, performing actions that do not normally [[Stealth#Breaking stealth|break stealth]] which also involve movement will cause the {{tip|invisibility}} to break. Notably, {{si|Flash}} and {{si|Teleport}}. If '''Teemo''' is in a {{tip|brush}} the aforementioned spells do not end the stealth so long as his exact destination is still inside brush.
** Starting {{sis|Teleport}} channel will not break ''Guerilla Warfare'', only the {{tip|blink}} upon completing the channel will (with the exception stated above).
* ''Guerilla Warfare'' will not activate while {{si|Recall|Recalling}}.
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the end of the attack windup.

Q.name: Blinding Dart
Q.description: Obscures an enemy's vision with a powerful venom, dealing damage to the target unit and blinding it for the duration.
Q.tooltip: Teemo fires a dart, Blinding the target for {{ blindduration }} seconds and dealing {{ calculateddamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Teemo}} shoots a dart at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|blind|blinds}} them for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Teemo''' shoots a dart at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|blind|blinds}} them for a duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|80 to 260}} {{as|(+ 70% AP)}}}}
{{st|Blind Duration|{{ap|2 to 3}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.description2: The duration of the {{tip|blind}} is doubled against {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Blinding Dart'' will not make abilities that can trigger [[on-hit effect]]s ({{ai|Parrrley|Gangplank}}, {{ai|Mystic Shot|Ezreal}}) miss.
* When blinded, enemies have a green tint on their screen.
* Because ''Blinding Dart'' uses {{tip|center range}}, it has 45 to 70 more range than his {{tip|basic attack|basic attacks}}, which use {{tip|edge range}}, against other {{tip|champions}}.
** This bonus becomes lower if '''Teemo''' or his target have [[size]] bonuses.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

W.name: Move Quick
W.description: Teemo scampers around, passively increasing his Move Speed until he is struck by an enemy champion or turret. Teemo can sprint to gain bonus Move Speed that isn't stopped by being struck for a short time.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Teemo gains {{ passivemovespeedbonus*100 }}% Move Speed while he hasn't been damaged by a champion or turret in the last {{ passivecooldownondamagetaken }} seconds.

Active: Teemo sprints, gaining {{ activemovespeedbonus*100 }}% Move Speed that is not lost when struck for {{ activemovespeedbuffduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Teemo}} gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} after a few seconds without taking damage from enemy {{tip|champions}} or {{tip|turrets}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Teemo''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a short time. The passive effect cannot be removed during this time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Teemo''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} after 5 seconds without taking damage from enemy {{tip|champions}} or {{tip|turrets}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Teemo''' gains {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} for 3 seconds. This overrides the passive bonus, but prevents the passive effect from being removed.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Casting Move Quick does not interrupt {{ai|Guerrilla Warfare|Teemo}}.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* When ''Move Quick's'' active bonus movement speed ends '''Teemo''' will not regain the passive one if he was damaged during the active's duration.
*''Move Quick's'' passive will be disabled even if the damage is blocked with a {{tip|spell shield}}.

E.name: Toxic Shot
E.description: Each of Teemo's attacks will poison the target, dealing damage on impact and each second after for 4 seconds.
E.tooltip: Passive: Teemo's Attacks apply poison, dealing an additional {{ impactcalculateddamage }} magic damage plus {{ totaldotdamage }} magic damage over {{ poisonduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{cis|Teemo}} basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and inflict {{tip|poison}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|poison|nolink=true}}:}} The target continually takes {{as|magic damage}} over a few seconds. Subsequent inflictions refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Passive:}} '''Teemo's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}} and inflict {{tip|poison}}.

{{sbc|{{tip|poison|nolink=true}}:}} The target takes {{as|magic damage}} every second over 4 seconds. Subsequent inflictions refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage On-Hit|{{ap|14 to 66}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}}}
{{st|Magic Damage per Tick|{{ap|6 to 30}} {{as|(+ 10% AP)}}|Total Poison Damage|{{ap|6*4 to 30*4}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Monster Damage On-Hit|{{ap|14*1.5 to 58*1.5}} {{as|(+ 45% AP)}}}}
{{st|Monster Damage per Tick|{{ap|6*1.5 to 30*1.5}} {{as|(+ 15% AP)}}|Total Monster Poison Damage|{{ap|6*4*1.5 to 30*4*1.5}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
*The initial hit from Toxic Shot will consume {{ri|Manaflow Band}} if it is available.
* The attacks do not affect [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s.

R.name: Noxious Trap
R.description: Teemo throws an explosive poisonous trap using one of the mushrooms stored in his pack. If an enemy steps on the trap, it will release a poisonous cloud, slowing enemies and damaging them over time. If Teemo throws a mushroom onto another mushroom it will bounce, gaining additional range.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Teemo}} tosses a poisonous mushroom to the target location that becomes {{tip|stealthed trap|stealthed}} and lasts for a while. It will bounce forward upon landing on another mushroom.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Teemo''' periodically [[ammunition|stocks]] a charge of ''Noxious Trap'', up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Mushrooms can be destroyed by enemy {{tip|basic attacks}} and will explode upon enemy contact, inflicting {{tip|poison}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for a few seconds, as well as {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|poison|nolink=true}}:}} The target takes {{as|magic damage}} every second over a few seconds. Subsequent inflictions refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Teemo''' tosses a poisonous mushroom to the target location that becomes {{tip|stealthed trap|stealthed}} after arming over 1 second, lasting for up to 5 minutes and granting {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings. If the mushroom lands on an already-placed one, it will bounce forward again for its cast distance, up to a cap, which can happen repeatedly.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Teemo''' periodically [[ammunition|stocks]] a ''Noxious Trap'' charge, up to a maximum amount.
wiki_detail.description3: The mushroom will explode upon enemy contact, inflicting {{tip|poison}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for 4 seconds, as well as {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|{{tip|poison|nolink=true}}:}} The target takes {{as|magic damage}} every second over 4 seconds. Subsequent inflictions refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling4: {{st|Magic Damage per Tick|{{ap|200/4 to 450/4}} {{as|(+ {{ap|50/4}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|200 to 450}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description5: A mushroom has {{sti|health|{{as|6 '''maximum''' health}}}} and can only be damaged by {{tip|champion}} basic attacks (2 damage from {{tip|ranged}} and 3 from {{tip|melee}}).
wiki_detail.description6: ''See [[Teemo/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for more details about mushroom traps.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The bounce can occur an indefinite amount of times while '''Teemo''' is alive. If '''Teemo''' dies before ''Noxious Trap'' bounces on another, the trap will disappear.
* {{ui|Rift Scuttler}} will not trigger ''Noxious Trap's'' explosion if it is not being attacked.
* Enemies who step on multiple ''Noxious Traps'' will only refresh the duration of the damage over time and slow.
* ''Noxious Trap's'' damage is determined when it detonates and not when planted, meaning if '''Teemo's''' {{sti|AP|{{as|ability power}}}} changes, the scaling is also altered to affect the active damage of all ''Noxious Traps'' so long as they do not explode.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will prevent the damage over time and slow for all units but will not prevent the detonation itself.
